title: MikroTik 2.4Ghz 5dbi Dipole Antenna with RPSMA connector
description: Now we offer 2.4Ghz 5dBi Dipole antennas with RPSMA connectors! Take BaseBox2 and simply attach two of those antennas on connectors of BaseBox2 to have 2x2 MIMO 2.4Ghz AP! By this you can have "2.4Ghz OmniTik", ideal for Outdoor Campus areas, for example, campings or trailer parks. Antennas are waterproof, so you can use BaseBox without top cover if both antennas are properly attached
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 1 x 1 VSWR < 2,0 Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 13 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 360 Antenna type Omnidirectional Antenna gain [dBi] 5 Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (1) RSMA male
